title: Emperor's Wisdom
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Emperor's Wisdom''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] of the fleet of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] which participated in the [[Battle of Ciutric]] under the command of the self-proclaimed "[[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]]" [[Delak Krennel]]. It was destroyed in the [[Battle of Ciutric]] by [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm bel Iblis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
